overlay_notes: Costinot-Werning optimal robot tax: 2.7% ad-valorem × auto_cost 10% → automation_tax_rate = 0.0027 of the saved compensation bill

grounding.debt_stock: ≈ 10 extra years of the FY2025 federal deficit — on top of what CBO already projects
grounding.fed_deficit_flow: ≈ the FY2025 federal deficit, every year — on top of what CBO already projects
grounding.real_gdp: ≈ 3.9 years of normal (~2%/yr) real growth, arriving all at once
grounding.revenue_flow: ≈ 1.0 full years of federal individual income-tax receipts
grounding.state_flow: ≈ 0.6× the entire Apollo program, every year
